title: armeriastrum baltanense
intro: Armeriastrum baltanense, also known as the Mongolian artemisia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Armeriastrum baltanense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil can also be extracted for use in aromatherapy.
